productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Addcash Red Casual Shoes
description: These lifestyle canvas shoes from adidas are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperHeavy canvas upper for snug Fit and protectionCotton lace-ups for snug fitBreathable canvas and upper re-enforcement with rubber compound for strength and longevity.MidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with herringbone patterns for great gripAbrasion resistant foxing & toe-guard for additional protection and durabilityshoe careKnock off loose dirt by smacking the sneakers togetherWipe with a damp cloth to remove caked dirtRinse shoes with warm waterScrub with mild detergent using a gentle toothbrushUse a non-bleaching soap for coloured canvasRinse off with cool water
